title: Fifth Theological Oration: On the Holy Spirit
description: Gregory completes the doctrine of the Trinity: the Spirit proceeds from the Father, not as generated but as 'breathed forth.'
introduction: Gregory completes the doctrine of the Trinity: the Spirit proceeds from the Father, not as generated but as 'breathed forth.'

translation.text: The Spirit proceeds from the Father, not by generation but by procession. What the difference is, tell me, and I will tell you what the generation and procession of God are.
